details: Svg-fetcher@2.4.1 is a trojanized package that performs remote code execution. The exported getPlugin() function fetches JSON from hxxps://svganchordev[.]net/icons/106 and passes the response body into new Function() with full Node.js built-in access (require, module, exports, process, console, Buffer), enabling the remote server to execute arbitrary JavaScript on the consumer's machine. The package also ships a real OpenSSH ed25519 private key (package/gitlab) and its corresponding public key (package/gitlab.pub). The package has no install hooks — the payload runs when the consumer calls the exported getPlugin() function. C2 host: svganchordev[.]net, path: /icons/106, request header: bearrtoken: logo.
